rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §264.403 governs interagency MOUs for child abuse multidisciplinary teams. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter with no overlapping operative effect.
quote: Sec. 264.403. INTERAGENCY MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING. (a) A center shall enter into a memorandum of understanding regarding participation in the multidisciplinary team response under Section 264.406.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and child protection MOU statute.
